title: Select White Paper Napkins - Pack of 100 2-Ply Disposable Table Napkins - Soft and Strong Paper Serviettes for All Occasions - Everyday Tissues for Cleaning Spills Wiping Surfaces Personal Hygiene
features: Soft, Strong, and Simple Disposable Tissues: Our Select napkins are designed to provide both functionality and style. Our super-absorbent serviettes excel at various tasks, from cleaning your surfaces, wiping liquids and, even catering for your hygiene needs.
High Quality 2-Ply 100-Pieces Paper Napkins : Our tissue napkins have a double-layered ply design for superior durability which are perfect for all your hygiene, cleaning, and wiping needs.
Versatile Disposable Tissue Papers: Whether you are hosting a special event or enjoying a casual meal at home, our white paper napkins provide a convenient and stylish solution for all needs.
Designed for Napkin Paper Dispensers: Compatible with almost all napkin dispensers and holders, these are packed to give you the best storage options and convenience.
Available in Different Multipacks: Looking for more table napkins? Our paper hankies are available in different packs of 100, such as 6-packs, 12-packs and 20-packs.
